expects.description: A `veritas readiness --check evidence --working-tree` run, projected by the kit adapter (adapter/readiness-to-trust-bundle.mjs) into a Hachure trust.bundle, produced a verified software-readiness-verdict claim for this change.
expects.explore_hint: Run `veritas readiness --check evidence --working-tree`, project its evidence report with adapter/readiness-to-trust-bundle.mjs, then `flow attach-evidence <run> --gate gate-check-gate --file <bundle> --bundle`.
